# Legal Disclaimer

This repository (the "Repository") is published by DreamDEX S.A. ("DreamDEX", "we", "us"). By accessing, cloning, downloading, or using any code, documentation, or other materials in this Repository (the "Materials"), you acknowledge and agree to the terms of this disclaimer. If you do not agree, do not use the Materials.

## 1. Educational and Illustrative Purposes Only

The Materials, including all template strategies, example bots, shared libraries, and documentation, are provided solely for educational, informational, and illustrative purposes. They demonstrate technical integration with the DreamDEX protocol. Nothing in this Repository constitutes, or should be relied upon as, investment advice, financial advice, trading advice, legal advice, tax advice, or any other form of professional advice. DreamDEX is not a broker, dealer, investment adviser, or fiduciary, and your use of the Materials does not create any fiduciary, advisory, or agency relationship.

## 2. No Recommendation or Endorsement

The inclusion of any strategy in this Repository is not a recommendation to deploy it, an endorsement of its logic, or a representation that it is profitable, suitable, or appropriate for you or for any market conditions. Any strategy may result in the partial or total loss of funds. Past performance of any strategy, whether in testing, in competition, or on mainnet, is not indicative of future results.

## 3. Trading Risk

Trading digital assets, including through automated or algorithmic strategies, involves substantial risk, including the risk of total loss. Automated strategies can behave unexpectedly, including as a result of software defects, network congestion, oracle or price-feed anomalies, smart contract upgrades, latency, liquidity conditions, or adversarial behaviour by other market participants. You are solely responsible for any strategy you deploy, any parameters you configure, and any losses you incur. Do not deploy capital you cannot afford to lose.

You are solely responsible for the generation, storage, and security of any private keys, session keys, or other credentials used with the Materials; DreamDEX will never ask you for your private keys.

## 4. Software Provided "As Is"

THE MATERIALS ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, ACCURACY, RELIABILITY, OR NON-INFRINGEMENT. THE MATERIALS HAVE NOT BEEN AUDITED. TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, DREAMDEX AND ITS AFFILIATES, DIRECTORS, OFFICERS, EMPLOYEES, AND CONTRACTORS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION LOSS OF FUNDS, LOSS OF PROFITS, OR LOSS OF DATA, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE MATERIALS OR THEIR USE, HOWEVER CAUSED AND UNDER ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY.

## 5. Example Bots, Code and Demonstrations

The `examples/` folder contains code derived from bots submitted by third-party participants in DreamDEX trading competitions. This code has been sanitised and anonymised, and is published with the consent of the relevant participants. It is provided strictly for reference. DreamDEX has not audited, verified, or validated this code and makes no representation that it is correct, safe, complete, or runnable. Run-status labels are informational only and are not a warranty of any kind. Examples marked as reference-only should not be deployed.

Certain contents of this Repository, including the EIP-7702 example, are technical demonstrations only. They illustrate protocol or network capabilities and are not trading strategies. They must not be treated or deployed as such.

## 6. Your Responsibility for Legal and Regulatory Compliance

You are solely responsible for determining whether your use of the Materials, and any trading activity you conduct, is lawful in your jurisdiction. Laws and regulations relating to digital assets, algorithmic trading, market conduct, taxation, and financial services vary between jurisdictions and change over time. The Materials are not directed at, and must not be used by, any person in a jurisdiction where such use would be unlawful, or by any person subject to sanctions administered by the United Nations, the United States, the United Kingdom, the European Union, or any other applicable authority.

## 7. Prohibited Use

You must not use the Materials to engage in market manipulation, wash trading, spoofing, artificial volume generation, front-running, or any other abusive, deceptive, or unlawful market conduct. Any use of the Materials for prohibited conduct is entirely at your own risk and responsibility, and DreamDEX disclaims all liability for such use.

## 8. No Obligation to Maintain

DreamDEX may modify, update, deprecate, or remove any part of the Materials at any time without notice and has no obligation to maintain the Repository, to keep any strategy compatible with future protocol upgrades, or to provide support of any kind.

## 9. Relationship to Other Terms

Your use of the DreamDEX protocol and any related interfaces remains subject to the applicable DreamDEX terms of service. The open-source licence accompanying this Repository governs your rights to copy, modify, and redistribute the code. In the event of a conflict between that licence and this disclaimer with respect to warranty and liability matters, the broader disclaimer and limitation of liability shall apply to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law.
